texto: In The Shadow Of The NightAll the clouds are gray, and the sky is dark as night. Soft words are spoken, and there's a twinkle, of a flicker of light.The presence of a Man walks by, and Mighty and Powerful is He.Kneeling down to pray, He says a prayer for me.The sky becomes brighter, and the leaves of the trees turn green.The flowers begin to bloom, and there's a warm gentle breeze.Thank you Lord for setting me free...
explicacao: Citação de Jerrel C. Thomas sobre esforço, persistência e resultados. “In The Shadow Of The NightAll the clouds are gray, and the sky is dark as night. Soft words are s…” articula reflexao, poems, there em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao-noturna e boa-noite.
